positive: A stunning, highly detailed symmetrical design featuring an overgrown celestial tapestry. The centerpiece is a magnificent stylized crescent moon intertwined with blooming bioluminescent flora and delicate cosmic fauna like ethereal moths and glowing fireflies. The art style is a fusion of Japanese woodblock print (Ukiyo-e) elegance and modern psychedelic linework, executed with clean, thick black outlines and rich, saturated gradients. Use a limited, striking color palette of deep indigo, emerald green, glowing gold, and celestial teal. The composition must be perfectly centered, maintaining strong silhouettes and high contrast suitable for a clean apparel print. Intricate detail, vectorial quality, mandala structure, symmetry.
negative: blur, artifacts, grainy, noise, text, words, watermark, signature, logo, blurry edges, low resolution, disfigured, bad anatomy, extra limbs, dirty, messy, poor composition, grayscale, monochrome only
